overall.description: Static cinematic view of the Great Hall from a Harry Potter game, showing students dining at long wooden tables beneath thousands of floating candles in a vast gothic stone hall with high vaulted ceilings and stained glass windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic great hall with floating candles and dining tables

segments.scene_description: A static view of the Great Hall filled with dining students seated at long wooden tables on both sides. Thousands of floating candles illuminate the gothic stone architecture and high vaulted ceiling, while stained glass windows provide dim natural light. The camera remains fixed in the center aisle, capturing the bustling yet stationary crowd and the magical atmosphere of the dining hall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, cinematic vista of the Great Hall, capturing the magical scale of the gothic architecture and the bustling student body. It begins with a centered view of the long wooden tables where students are seated, framed by the immense stone walls of the hall. As the eye travels upward, the scene expands to reveal thousands of floating candles that cast a warm glow against the high vaulted ceilings. The composition remains fixed, allowing the dim natural light from the stained glass windows to blend with the flickering candlelight, finally settling into a comprehensive portrait of the enchanted dining atmosphere.
